title: Suits to determine validity of bonds
doc_html:
§281.  Suits to determine validity of bonds

Any suit to determine the validity of bonds of the Authority shall be brought only in accordance with R.S. 13:5121 et seq.

Added by Acts 1983, No. 96, §1, eff. July 23, 1983.
